subject: feat(graph): add label-based node shapes, arc coloring, text outlines, and label truncation
body:
Four visual improvements using built-in Cytoscape.js features (no new dependencies):

1. Node shapes by label: Well-known labels (Person→ellipse, Company→roundrectangle,
   Event→diamond, etc.) map to distinct shapes. Unknown labels hash to fallback shapes.
2. Arc coloring by title: Arcs now hash their title to pick from the color palette
   instead of uniform gray, so relationship types are visually distinguishable.
3. Text outlines: Node labels get 2px outline, edge labels get 1px outline using
   base-100 (page background) for readability on any background.
4. Text truncation: Node labels truncate at 120px, edge labels at 80px via
   Cytoscape's built-in text-wrap: ellipsis to prevent overlap on dense graphs.

Tags: graph, styling, cytoscape, visual
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: graph-styling
Semver: minor
